normal_prompts: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium subscriptions.
Create an e-commerce store with a shopping cart, product catalog, user reviews, and Stripe checkout.
Make a project management tool with Kanban boards, task assignments, due dates, and email notifications.
Build a blogging platform where users can write posts, leave comments, and administrators can moderate content.
I need a helpdesk ticketing system with user accounts, priority levels, agent assignments, and status tracking.
Create a real estate listing app with property search, agent contact forms, and a map view.
Build a learning management system with courses, video uploads, student progress tracking, and certificates.
Make an inventory management app with barcode scanning, stock alerts, and supplier tracking.
Create a fitness tracking app where users log workouts, see charts of progress, and earn badges.
Build a booking system for a hair salon with calendar integration, staff schedules, and SMS reminders.
edge_cases: Build a marketplace but don't allow sellers
Create a system where nobody can login, it's just a public dashboard of random numbers
Make an app that does absolutely nothing except show a blank screen
I want an enterprise ERP system but it only has one button that says 'Buy Now'
Build a healthcare app without any security or authentication
Create a chat app with no way to send messages
